message:
Enhance beads with comprehensive testing, acceptance criteria, and dependencies

Major improvements to bead quality and completeness:

## Test Suites Added (4 new beads)
- bd-6e9.9: Bubbles Widget Test Suite - detailed test cases for all widgets
- bd-3bp.13: Rich Renderables Test Suite - measurement and rendering tests
- bd-3ky.15: OpenTUI Core Systems Test Suite - fuzzing and conformance tests
- bd-1ho.8: Rich Core Infrastructure Test Suite - e2e and integration tests

## Acceptance Criteria Added
Key beads now include structured acceptance criteria with:
- Functional requirements checklist
- Performance targets with specific metrics
- Logging requirements (tracing::debug/info/warn levels)
- Test coverage requirements
- Unicode/internationalization requirements where applicable

Updated beads: bd-6e9.1, bd-3ky.1, bd-3ky.3, bd-3ky.5, bd-3ky.6, bd-3ky.10,
               bd-3ky.12, bd-1ho.1, bd-1ho.2, bd-3bp.2, bd-3bp.8, bd-6e9.8

## Dependencies Fixed
- Added 7 missing dependencies identified by bv robot-suggest
- Added 42 test suite dependencies (tests depend on implementations)
- All test suites depend on bd-10i.11 (Testing + QA infrastructure)

## Validation
- No dependency cycles detected
- 165 total beads (151 open, 14 closed)
- 14 ready to work (unblocked)
- 124 blocked (proper dependency ordering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
